drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f0 not in (0.5, 4.0, 2.5))
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p0_0.getF0(), $p0_0.isF1()));
end
rule "R1"
salience($b1_0_0 - $b1_0_1)
when
    $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    insertLogical(new T1($b1_0_1, $p1_0.isF1()));
end
rule "R2"
when
    T1(f1 == false)
    T1($b2_1_0 : f0, $b2_1_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R3"
salience -4
when
    accumulate( T0(f1 != false, $s3_0 : f0); $a3_0 : sum($s3_0) )
then
end
rule "R4"
no-loop
agenda-group "ga"
when
    ( T1(f1 == false) and T1($b4_1_0 : f0, $b4_1_1 : f0) )
    or
    ( T1(f1 == false) and T1($b4_1_0 : f0, $b4_1_1 : f0) )
    or
    ( T1(f1 != true) and T1($b4_1_0 : f0, $b4_1_1 : f0, f0 == 0) )
then
end
name: fz_9005_450
